description: Local-first resume tailoring: parse JD/resume, score alignment, Ollama-backed rewrites, LaTeX/PDF export. Prompts live in inherited YAML packs; FastAPI calls Ollama with JSON-only contracts.
prompt_examples: YAML (global_base): truthfulness_constraints — Never fabricate employers, titles, dates...; rewrite_policy conservative|balanced|aggressive_truthful.
YAML (software_engineering): inherits global_base + industry_base; preferred_verbs, anti_patterns, section_specific_rewrite_instructions.
ollama_provider.structured_extract system: 'You are a deterministic extraction assistant. Return strict JSON only. Do not invent facts. Keep confidence conservative.'
ollama_provider.critique_resume system: 'You are a resume critic. Prioritize truthfulness, ATS safety, and evidence quality. Return strict JSON.'
rewrite_engine merges constraints with truthfulness list: never fabricate achievements; never inflate title/scope; require explicit evidence for metrics.
patterns_observed: JSON-schema hints in user prompts + strict key validation
Separation of domain policy (YAML) from API mechanics (Python)
lessons: Treat resume/ATS as a safety-critical domain: repeat truthfulness in system prompts and structured constraints; externalize industry tone in composable YAML; always validate JSON and plan a non-LLM fallback.

description: Consolidated OpsPilot workspace with prompt library for agent OS: product north star, control model, phased roadmap, and SHOT prompts that drive architecture reconciliation.
prompt_examples: 01_product_north_star.md: Vision — local-first portable agent; supervised desktop operator.

SHOT_1_ARCHITECTURE_PROMPT.md: 'You are working inside the workflow-llm-dataset project... Do not treat this as a cold start.' Grounding list of files; hard rules: do not rewrite whole repo in Shot 1; inspect actual code; required outputs REPO_REALITY.md, REFERENCE_FRAMEWORK_MAPPING.md.
patterns_observed: Numbered prompt pack as single source of truth
Shot-based scoping to prevent runaway refactors
lessons: Large agent projects benefit from a documented prompt pack referenced by SHOT prompts; tie every instruction to artifacts (paths) and verification (code inspection).

description: Nutraceutical platform with n8n workflow: scrape data, aggregate demand, Ollama LangChain agent for strategic analysis, Google Sheets export.
prompt_examples: PRODUCT_RESEARCH_WORKFLOW_PROMPT.md: Meta-prompt to build entire n8n workflow (phases 1-6, nodes, delays, Ollama chat URL, sheet tabs).
Embedded agent systemMessage: senior nutraceutical strategist for Indian market; user text includes six numbered deliverables.
patterns_observed: Pipeline: deterministic extraction → single LLM call with full context
Dual-layer role (system persona + user task with numbered bullets)
lessons: Compress tabular data into readable report before the LLM step; use numbered outputs so downstream use is predictable.

description: Chrome extension: academic prompt enhancer with variants (Socratic, research, lab, citation-ready), integrity guardrails.
prompt_examples: buildVariants sharedPillars: Audience; Academic integrity: no ghostwriting; Citations; Evidence; Style; Length.
outputScaffold: numbered sections Direct answer, Key terms, Next steps, How to verify, References.
Role strings: Socratic / Research / Lab / Citation-ready composed via scaffoldPrompt(Context, Role, Task, Constraints).
patterns_observed: Multiple prompt variants from shared pillars
Dynamic ethics note from policy URLs
lessons: Educational UIs benefit from reusable pillars plus one output scaffold; vary only role to avoid duplicating safety text.

description: Markdown spec for autonomous coding agent: edits only train.py, runs fixed-time experiments, logs metrics to TSV, advances or reverts git, must not ask human to continue.
prompt_examples: What you CANNOT do: modify prepare.py; install packages; modify evaluation harness.
LOOP FOREVER: tune → commit → run → grep metrics → record TSV → advance or reset.
NEVER STOP: do not ask 'should I keep going?'; autonomous until human interrupts.
Simplicity criterion: A 0.001 improvement that adds 20 lines of hacky code? Probably not worth it.
patterns_observed: Long-horizon autonomy with explicit stop conditions
lessons: Autonomous agents need immutable evaluation, one editable surface, machine-readable logs, and explicit silence rules.
